metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop advanced skills in music composition, arranging, and studio production. This course emphasizes advanced music composition, recording techniques, and the integration of compositional and production elements.
metadata.general_description: Advanced composition and music production course for sophisticated music creation.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced composition allows sophisticated musical expression and communication of complex ideas.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 composers create substantial works demonstrating harmonic sophistication, structural mastery, and artistic vision.

big_ideas.statement: Arranging and orchestration expand compositional possibilities across diverse ensembles and contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced arrangers adapt compositions creatively for different instruments and configurations while maintaining artistic intent.

big_ideas.statement: Studio production and recording are integral to contemporary music creation and distribution.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students understand how production choices shape final artistic work and reach audiences.

big_ideas.statement: Composition, arranging, and production at advanced level require both technical skill and artistic vision.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students integrate multiple disciplines in sophisticated music creation that meets professional standards.

competencies.raw: Compose substantial original works in diverse styles
i_can_statements: I can compose full-length or complex pieces
I can demonstrate harmonic and melodic sophistication
I can compose in various styles and forms
I can realize artistic vision through composition
I can arrange compositions for various ensembles
I can adapt and reorchestrate existing works
I can make creative arrangement choices
I can enhance arrangements with artistic interpretation

competencies.raw: Produce and record music at professional quality
i_can_statements: I can produce professional-quality recordings
I can integrate composition and production artistically
I can mix and master music effectively
I can achieve professional production standards

competencies.raw: Integrate composition, arranging, and production into unified works
i_can_statements: I can create complete works from composition to final recording
I can make creative choices across all disciplines
I can develop cohesive artistic works
I can realize sophisticated musical visions

competencies.raw: Analyze compositions and arrangements with sophistication
i_can_statements: I can analyze harmonic, melodic, and structural elements
I can understand compositional techniques and forms
I can recognize sophisticated arrangement and orchestration
I can evaluate musical work against artistic standards

competencies.raw: Understand music production and recording at professional level
i_can_statements: I can explain professional recording and mixing techniques
I can understand how production choices affect musical work
I can evaluate production quality and artistry
I can understand music industry standards

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and compositional voice
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my compositional and production growth
I can articulate my musical style and artistic approach
I can identify my strengths and artistic interests
I can envision continued artistic development

competencies.raw: Engage with music traditions and contemporary composition
i_can_statements: I can understand compositional traditions and history
I can recognize contemporary compositional approaches
I can understand how composition reflects cultural contexts
I can participate in conversations about musical practice

competencies.raw: Create professional scores, arrangements, and recordings
i_can_statements: I can notate music professionally and clearly
I can create performance parts from scores
I can produce professional recordings
I can organize and archive musical work
I can articulate my compositional intent and approach
I can explain production and arrangement decisions
I can discuss my work with musicians and collaborators
I can write about my compositions and approach

competencies.raw: Share compositions and recordings with audiences
i_can_statements: I can perform or present my compositions
I can share recordings through various platforms
I can engage audiences with my musical work
I can build recognition for my compositions

competencies.raw: Communicate through music and artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can express complex ideas and emotions through composition
I can create music that connects with audiences
I can use composition to explore meaningful themes
I can develop distinctive artistic voice

competencies.raw: Draw from diverse musical traditions in composition
i_can_statements: I can incorporate diverse musical influences
I can understand and respect varied traditions
I can create fusion work thoughtfully
I can appreciate global musical perspectives

competencies.raw: Explore contemporary and innovative compositional approaches
i_can_statements: I can engage with contemporary compositional techniques
I can experiment with emerging technologies
I can develop work at edge of contemporary practice
I can contribute to musical innovation

competencies.raw: Connect composition to broader cultural and social contexts
i_can_statements: I can create work addressing cultural or social themes
I can understand music's role in society
I can compose work with cultural awareness
I can contribute to cultural conversations through music

competencies.raw: Plan for continued compositional and professional development
i_can_statements: I can develop professional portfolio of compositions
I can explore pathways to composition and production careers
I can build networks in music and audio industries
I can envision lifelong compositional and musical practice

areas.name: Integration of Composition and Production
topics: Workflow from composition to final recording
